items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario 'Graceful degradation when agent confused', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this behavior or any related outcomes. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence or traces to support the expected result, the validation cannot proceed.
